sprint: Ambience Threaded Through Every Screen + Real Preload Gate + LumoVoice Load-Lag Fix
task: Moved AudioManager.init() from _beginBoot() (after the Traveller Gateway hands off) to the very top of boot, so ambience plays under the Gateway's own cinematic too, not just the Hall reached afterward. Fixed a real bug in js/lumoVoice.js: every recorded voice line was created lazily at play() time with zero preload and a silently-swallowed failure -- exactly the reported 'audio does not play always, may be load lag.' Added preload()/whenReady() to both js/audioManager.js and js/lumoVoice.js, and a real preload-gate overlay (per a direct follow-up request) that holds every screen until both are ready or a bounded timeout elapses. Verified via Playwright: gate shows immediately, clears once readiness resolves (~625ms on this sandbox), AudioManager confirmed initialized before the Gateway is even skipped; full regression across the sky-challenge suites unchanged.
